summary: Elder Cook testifies that through Jesus Christ’s Atonement and Resurrection and the restored priesthood keys of sealing, God’s children can make and keep covenants that unite families eternally and bring them back to the Father.
haiku:
Easter morning light
Keys turn hearts across all time
Families sealed in Christ
key_points: Jesus Christ’s Atonement and Resurrection make salvation and eternal life possible through repentance and covenant faithfulness.
Elijah restored the sealing keys in the Kirtland Temple, enabling temple ordinances that bind families on earth and in heaven.
We can receive spiritual confirmation of Christ, the Restoration, and eternal families through scripture study, temple worship, and keeping covenants.
scriptures_and_gospel_principles: Doctrine and Covenants 2 — Moroni’s prophecy of Elijah and turning hearts to the fathers
Doctrine and Covenants 110 — The Savior, Moses, Elias, and Elijah appearing in the Kirtland Temple
Malachi 4:5–6 — Elijah’s promised return before the great and dreadful day of the Lord
1 Kings 7:25 — Symbolism connected to Solomon’s temple and the twelve oxen
Matthew 17:1–13 — Elijah and Moses at the Mount of Transfiguration
3 Nephi 25 — The Savior teaching Malachi’s prophecy to the Nephites
The Atonement and Resurrection of Jesus Christ
Priesthood keys and the sealing power
Temple ordinances, covenants, and eternal families
Baptism and saving ordinances for the dead
questions_to_ponder: How does Easter deepen my gratitude for both the Atonement and Resurrection of Jesus Christ?
Why are priesthood keys essential to the work of salvation and exaltation?
What does it mean for my heart to turn to my fathers and my descendants?
How can temple ordinances help me feel closer to the Savior?
What can I do to better honor and keep my covenants?
How have I received spiritual confirmation of Jesus Christ, the Restoration, or eternal families?
